testcase.name: test_customer_can_export_data_json

failure.message: AssertionError: Export should include user or customer data assert ('user' in {'customer_id': '0c398d13-7d37-468d-92d8-968e5c7b6f12', 'data': {'account': {'company_name': 'Test Company', 'email': 'testcustomer@test.com', 'failed_login_attempts': 0, 'full_name': 'Test Customer', ...}, 'activity_log': [], 'notes': [], 'orders': [], ...}, 'export_date': '2026-02-23T22:21:44.363909+00:00', 'tenant_id': 'automate-accounts'} or 'customer' in {'customer_id': '0c398d13-7d37-468d-92d8-968e5c7b6f12', 'data': {'account': {'company_name': 'Test Company', 'email': 'testcustomer@test.com', 'failed_login_attempts': 0, 'full_name': 'Test Customer', ...}, 'activity_log': [], 'notes': [], 'orders': [], ...}, 'export_date': '2026-02-23T22:21:44.363909+00:00', 'tenant_id': 'automate-accounts'})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter72_httponly_cookie_auth.py:163: in test_customer_can_export_data_json assert "user" in data or "customer" in data, "Export should include user or customer data" E AssertionError: Export should include user or customer data E assert ('user' in {'customer_id': '0c398d13-7d37-468d-92d8-968e5c7b6f12', 'data': {'account': {'company_name': 'Test Company', 'email': 'testcustomer@test.com', 'failed_login_attempts': 0, 'full_name': 'Test Customer', ...}, 'activity_log': [], 'notes': [], 'orders': [], ...}, 'export_date': '2026-02-23T22:21:44.363909+00:00', 'tenant_id': 'automate-accounts'} or 'customer' in {'customer_id': '0c398d13-7d37-468d-92d8-968e5c7b6f12', 'data': {'account': {'company_name': 'Test Company', 'email': 'testcustomer@test.com', 'failed_login_attempts': 0, 'full_name': 'Test Customer', ...}, 'activity_log': [], 'notes': [], 'orders': [], ...}, 'export_date': '2026-02-23T22:21:44.363909+00:00', 'tenant_id': 'automate-accounts'})

testcase.name: test_customer_can_export_data_using_cookie

failure.message: AssertionError: Export should include user or customer data assert ('user' in {'customer_id': '0c398d13-7d37-468d-92d8-968e5c7b6f12', 'data': {'account': {'company_name': 'Test Company', 'email': 'testcustomer@test.com', 'failed_login_attempts': 0, 'full_name': 'Test Customer', ...}, 'activity_log': [{'action': 'data_export_requested', 'actor': 'customer:0c398d13-7d37-468d-92d8-968e5c7b6f12', 'created_at': '2026-02-23T22:21:44.425832+00:00', 'details': {'format': 'json'}, ...}], 'notes': [], 'orders': [], ...}, 'export_date': '2026-02-23T22:21:44.880593+00:00', 'tenant_id': 'automate-accounts'} or 'customer' in {'customer_id': '0c398d13-7d37-468d-92d8-968e5c7b6f12', 'data': {'account': {'company_name': 'Test Company', 'email': 'testcustomer@test.com', 'failed_login_attempts': 0, 'full_name': 'Test Customer', ...}, 'activity_log': [{'action': 'data_export_requested', 'actor': 'customer:0c398d13-7d37-468d-92d8-968e5c7b6f12', 'created_at': '2026-02-23T22:21:44.425832+00:00', 'details': {'format': 'json'}, ...}], 'notes': [], 'orders': [], ...}, 'export_date': '2026-02-23T22:21:44.880593+00:00', 'tenant_id': 'automate-accounts'})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter72_httponly_cookie_auth.py:173: in test_customer_can_export_data_using_cookie assert "user" in data or "customer" in data, "Export should include user or customer data" E AssertionError: Export should include user or customer data E assert ('user' in {'customer_id': '0c398d13-7d37-468d-92d8-968e5c7b6f12', 'data': {'account': {'company_name': 'Test Company', 'email': 'testcustomer@test.com', 'failed_login_attempts': 0, 'full_name': 'Test Customer', ...}, 'activity_log': [{'action': 'data_export_requested', 'actor': 'customer:0c398d13-7d37-468d-92d8-968e5c7b6f12', 'created_at': '2026-02-23T22:21:44.425832+00:00', 'details': {'format': 'json'}, ...}], 'notes': [], 'orders': [], ...}, 'export_date': '2026-02-23T22:21:44.880593+00:00', 'tenant_id': 'automate-accounts'} or 'customer' in {'customer_id': '0c398d13-7d37-468d-92d8-968e5c7b6f12', 'data': {'account': {'company_name': 'Test Company', 'email': 'testcustomer@test.com', 'failed_login_attempts': 0, 'full_name': 'Test Customer', ...}, 'activity_log': [{'action': 'data_export_requested', 'actor': 'customer:0c398d13-7d37-468d-92d8-968e5c7b6f12', 'created_at': '2026-02-23T22:21:44.425832+00:00', 'details': {'format': 'json'}, ...}], 'notes': [], 'orders': [], ...}, 'export_date': '2026-02-23T22:21:44.880593+00:00', 'tenant_id': 'automate-accounts'})

skipped.message: Admin login failed, skipping email provider tests

testcase.name: test_tenant_b_admin_login
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter72_httponly_cookie_auth.py:425: in test_tenant_b_admin_login assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 429: {"detail": "Rate limit exceeded. Please slow down and try again."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_tenant_b_admin_can_access_me
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter72_httponly_cookie_auth.py:439: in test_tenant_b_admin_can_access_me headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {self.tenant_b_token}"} ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'TestTenantBAdminAccess' object has no attribute 'tenant_b_token'

testcase.name: test_tenant_b_admin_can_access_integration_status
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter72_httponly_cookie_auth.py:453: in test_tenant_b_admin_can_access_integration_status headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {self.tenant_b_token}"} ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'TestTenantBAdminAccess' object has no attribute 'tenant_b_token'
